info_plist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TruckNav Pro needs your location to provide turn-by-turn navigation and track your route even when the app is in the background.
info_plist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs your location to show your position on the map and provide navigation guidance.
info_plist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs continuous location access to provide navigation guidance while you drive.
info_plist.NSMotionUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro uses motion data to improve navigation accuracy and detect when you're driving.
info_plist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs camera access to allow you to report traffic incidents with photos.
info_plist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs photo library access to let you attach photos to incident reports.
info_plist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs permission to save route screenshots to your photo library.
info_plist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro needs microphone access for voice commands and navigation.
info_plist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: TruckNav Pro uses this information to provide personalized route recommendations.

ios.title: Navigation Active
ios.message: TruckNav Pro is tracking your location for navigation

location.title: Enable Location Services
location.message: TruckNav Pro needs your location to provide accurate navigation and route guidance. This includes finding truck-safe routes and avoiding restrictions.

backgroundLocation.title: Allow Background Location
backgroundLocation.message: To continue navigation when you switch apps or lock your screen, TruckNav Pro needs background location access. This ensures uninterrupted guidance during your journey.

camera.title: Camera Access
camera.message: Take photos to report traffic incidents, road hazards, or document delivery locations.

notifications.title: Enable Notifications
notifications.message: Receive important alerts about route changes, traffic incidents, and navigation instructions.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.message: Use voice commands to control navigation and search for destinations hands-free.
